llm_recommendations.reason_for_recommendation: Launches ultra-luxury residential development 'Prive Iconic Tower' in Gurugram, expects ₹580 crore revenue, strong response at launch.
Announces ₹238 crore share buyback at ₹1,600 per share; Q4FY26 net profit rose 26% YoY and full FY26 net profit increased 28%.
Mentioned as a 'Market Mover' as Sensex and Nifty surge, tracking positive global trends and easing crude oil prices.
